programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: (M) Ann Metz lives for her family, particularly her two granddaughters; but her husband Marshall goes to desperate measures to keep control of her if he doesn't get enough attention.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Lost Women Of Highway 20
programme.desc: (M) Detectives discover that Rachanda's disappearance is connected to other crimes buried in Oregon's wilds. Now they must close in on a criminal who has evaded justice for decades.

programme.title: Lost Women Of Highway 20
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
